books.title: The Richest Man in Babylon
books.author: George S. Clason
books.description: Classic parables about saving and building wealth through ancient Babylonian stories.

books.title: Rich Dad Poor Dad
books.author: Robert Kiyosaki
books.description: Contrasts two father figures to teach financial literacy and the importance of investing in assets.

books.title: The Psychology of Money
books.author: Morgan Housel
books.description: Explores how people think about money and how behavior drives financial outcomes more than knowledge.

books.title: Atomic Habits
books.author: James Clear
books.description: Practical strategies for building good habits and breaking bad ones through small incremental changes.

books.title: Sapiens: A Brief History of Humankind
books.author: Yuval Noah Harari
books.description: A sweeping narrative of human history from the stone age through the modern era.

books.title: Thinking, Fast and Slow
books.author: Daniel Kahneman
books.description: Explores the two systems that drive the way we think — fast intuitive thinking and slow rational thinking.

books.title: The 7 Habits of Highly Effective People
books.author: Stephen R. Covey
books.description: A principle-centered approach for solving personal and professional problems through seven habits.

books.title: Man's Search for Meaning
books.author: Viktor E. Frankl
books.description: A Holocaust survivor's account of finding purpose in suffering and the foundations of logotherapy.

books.title: Meditations
books.author: Marcus Aurelius
books.description: Personal writings of the Roman Emperor Marcus Aurelius reflecting on Stoic philosophy and self-improvement.

books.title: The Subtle Art of Not Giving a F*ck
books.author: Mark Manson
books.description: A counterintuitive approach to living a good life by choosing what truly matters and letting go of the rest.

books.title: Educated
books.author: Tara Westover
books.description: A memoir about a woman who grew up in a survivalist family and eventually earned a PhD from Cambridge.

books.title: A Brief History of Time
books.author: Stephen Hawking
books.description: An accessible exploration of the universe, black holes, the big bang, and the nature of time and space.

books.title: The Power of Now
books.author: Eckhart Tolle
books.description: A guide to spiritual enlightenment through present-moment awareness and releasing the ego.

books.title: Zero to One
books.author: Peter Thiel
books.description: Notes on startups and how to build companies that create new things rather than copying existing ones.

books.title: The Lean Startup
books.author: Eric Ries
books.description: A methodology for developing businesses and products through validated learning and rapid experimentation.

books.title: Deep Work
books.author: Cal Newport
books.description: Rules for focused success in a distracted world — the ability to focus without distraction is a superpower.

books.title: The Alchemist
books.author: Paulo Coelho
books.description: A philosophical novel about a young shepherd's journey to find treasure and discover his personal legend.

books.author: George Orwell
books.description: A dystopian novel about totalitarian surveillance, propaganda, and the destruction of individual freedom.

books.title: The Great Gatsby
books.author: F. Scott Fitzgerald
books.description: A portrait of the Jazz Age exploring themes of wealth, class, love, and the corruption of the American Dream.

books.title: How to Win Friends and Influence People
books.author: Dale Carnegie
books.description: Timeless principles for building meaningful relationships, winning people over, and becoming a better leader.

books.title: The 48 Laws of Power
books.author: Robert Greene
books.description: Distills 3,000 years of history into 48 laws for understanding and wielding power effectively.

books.title: Ikigai: The Japanese Secret to a Long and Happy Life
books.author: Héctor García
books.description: Explores the Japanese concept of ikigai — finding purpose and joy at the intersection of passion and contribution.

books.title: The Art of War
books.author: Sun Tzu
books.description: Ancient Chinese military treatise on strategy, tactics, and the philosophy of conflict and competition.

books.title: Outliers
books.author: Malcolm Gladwell
books.description: Examines the factors behind extraordinary success, arguing that opportunity and culture matter as much as talent.

books.title: The Intelligent Investor
books.author: Benjamin Graham
books.description: The definitive book on value investing, teaching how to analyze stocks and build long-term wealth safely.

books.title: Dune
books.author: Frank Herbert
books.description: An epic science fiction saga about politics, religion, ecology, and power on a desert planet called Arrakis.

books.title: The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy
books.author: Douglas Adams
books.description: A comedic science fiction series following an ordinary man swept into absurd intergalactic adventures.

books.title: Good to Great
books.author: Jim Collins
books.description: Research-driven analysis of what separates good companies from truly great ones over sustained periods.

books.title: The Body Keeps the Score
books.author: Bessel van der Kolk
books.description: Explores how trauma reshapes the body and brain, and presents innovative treatments for recovery.

books.title: Shoe Dog
books.author: Phil Knight
books.description: Nike founder Phil Knight's memoir about the risks, struggles, and triumphs of building one of the world's most iconic brands.
